params.name: Cherub Medical Manual
params.description: Cherub Medical Manual was compiled by the Chinese Red Cross. It records the medical knowledge and nursing skills for childhood leukemia. As the first Q&A medical book specifically for childhood leukemia, it has filled the vacancy of childhood leukemia knowledge popularization!
